lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

questions.text: What mission did Jesus give to his disciples?
answers: Conquer the world with an army of angels

questions.text: What promise did Jesus make after giving them their mission?
answers: He would be with them to the end
They would have an easy life

questions.text: How many days did Jesus appear to his disciples after he rose from the dead?
Who did Jesus say would come to give the disciples power?

answers: He ascended through the clouds to heaven
He walked into the desert and disappeared
He climbed a stairway to heaven

questions.text: What special word describes how Jesus left earth?
What did the two angels tell the disciples?
answers: Jesus will return in the same way he left
You are coming to heaven today, too
Jesus will return, but in a different way

questions.text: What did Jesus say no one knows?
answers: The day or time of his return

questions.text: How does Noah and the ark teach us about Jesus’ return?
answers: We should be ready for Jesus’ return like Noah was ready for the flood
We should build a bigger boat
We should gather two of every animal

questions.text: What special words describe the mission Jesus gave us?
